{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based risk-on rally with Nifty +0.94%, Realty leading +2.65%, Auto +1.40%, Metal +1.27%, and even PSU Banks +1.08%. VIX cooling -2.17% to 18.06 supports continuation. Book is +1.20% on the day; priority is locking in gains via SL trails on the winners while screening 1-2 high-conviction additions in non-saturated themes.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24290
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1040.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.9%, SL already at 1040 (well above entry 984, locks in ~5.7% gain). Stock holding 1050-1057 range, Realty/HFC tailwind intact, Q4 beat (+19% PAT YoY, sub-1% GNPA). Holding HOLD effectively — emitting MODIFY at same levels would be a no-op, so keeping HOLD via position_actions instead. Correcting: HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1040 (locks in ~+5.7% from entry 984). Realty/HFC theme leading today. Target 1110 still 5.5% away. Trailing further would crowd CMP 1053; current SL gives breathing room without ceding the gain."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge -2.1%. Risk-on day mildly headwinds gold but structural bullish thesis ($5,000+ JPM target, central bank buying, INR weakness) intact. SL 119 (~-3.6% below CMP 122.51) appropriate for a hedge sleeve. Holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1810.00,
      "new_target": 1880.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+5.2%, hit fresh 52w high 1841. SL 1810 already locks in +4.4% from entry 1734. Q4 results May 19 = binary event in ~10 sessions. Per binary-event rule, position is currently 5.4% of capital — at the edge of the 5% event-trade cap. Keeping SL tight at 1810 (within 1% of CMP 1825) caps tail risk while leaving target room to 1880. No-op MODIFY — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL 1810 already very tight (-0.8% from CMP 1825), locks in +4.4% from entry. Q4 earnings May 19 — 10 sessions away, manageable. Will revisit closer to event for trim or further tighten. Organon deal narrative still constructive."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,

April production -9.7% YoY is a real concern, dividend Rs 26.75 already declared (no more catalysts). Same-value MODIFY would be no-op — switching to HOLD with intent to trail higher only on close above 487."
    },
    {

      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",

    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 944.00,
      "new_target": 990.00,

      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.4%, CMP 955.70. SL already at entry 944 (breakeven). Q4 already out (+22% PAT). Trailing SL closer would crowd noise. Holding — switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJFINANCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "SL at entry 944 (breakeven, ~-1.2% from CMP). Q4 results already digested. Will trail to 950+ only after decisive close above 960."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1700.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+2.1%, CMP 1713.90, fresh 52w high 1723 today. SL already at entry 1700 (breakeven). Q4 results MAY 5 (TOMORROW) — binary event within 1 session. Per binary-event rule, must choose (a) exit, (b) tighten SL, or (c) reduce. Position is ~5% capital; tight SL at 1700 (-0.8% from CMP) effectively caps the tail to breakeven. Keeping SL at 1700 — same as stored, no-op MODIFY. Switching to HOLD with explicit acknowledgment."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "BINARY EVENT: Q4 results tomorrow May 5. Choosing option (b): SL already at entry 1700 (-0.8% from CMP 1713.90), capping tail to breakeven on miss. Position size ~5% capital — at event-trade cap limit. Cargo +15% YoY April, dividend Rs 7.50 announced — fundamentals supportive. Will reassess post-result."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3% only, choppy day (range 1524-1600, faded from highs). Q4 results May 8/14 — binary in 3-5 sessions. Position is ~4.6% capital, within event-trade cap. SL 1490 (-2.9% from CMP 1534.40) is reasonable; tightening further would risk a noise stopout in this volatile name. Holding through; will reassess Day 16."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.6%, CMP 13695 vs entry 13800. Stock made fresh intraday high 13976 then faded. Auto sector +1.40%, record April sales (239,646 units), brokerage targets up to 16,000. SL 13400 (-2.2%) appropriate. Thesis intact, holding."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 10100.00,
      "new_target": 10800.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.95% intraday move took stock to 10477 high then faded to 10302. Position essentially flat (-0.1%) but stock has shown strength. Board meeting May 6 (2 sessions) for Q4 + buyback decision = MAJOR binary event. Per binary-event rule, tightening SL from 10000 to 10100 (-2.0% from CMP 10302) caps tail risk into the binary, while leaving room above today's open 10244. Position size ~5.1% — at event-trade cap. Trail-gap discipline: 10100 is 2% below CMP, well clear of intraday noise."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 100,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 506.00,
      "stop_loss": 488.00,
      "target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Realty sector leader (+3.40%), index +2.65% — strongest sector today. Data center pivot ($2.1B plan, Singapore subsidiary, tax holiday until 2047) differentiates from pure realty peers. Q4 results May 11 — outside the 3-session binary window. Q2 fundamentals strong (PAT +31% YoY). Risk: 506-488 = 18 (3.6% SL), reward 506→540 = 34 (6.7%), R:R 1.89. Position size ~₹50,600 (5.0% capital) = small event-aware sizing. Confidence 0.62 maps to 5% allocation per sizing rule. Cluster check: no other Realty names in book, no pending Realty orders. Cooldown N/A — no prior ANANTRAJ position. R:R math: |540-506|/|506-488| = 34/18 = 1.89 ≥ 1.5 ✓."
    }
  ],

  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL/HAL/SYNGENE/LALPATHLAB/FLUOROCHEM all up 5-13% — chasing extended intraday moves is poor R:R. Will revisit on pullback. KOTAKBANK -5% post Q4 — interesting dip-buy if it stabilizes above 1700 with volume. BANDHANBNK governance overhang (PCA history) — pass. CONCORDBIO Citi cut -33% target — pass. AMBUJACEM Q3 PAT -90%, Q4 today binary — pass. EXIDEIND Q4 today binary — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 52%, healthy cash buffer 48%. 10 positions — book is wide; not adding more than 1 today. Three binary events clustered: ADANIPORTS Q4 tomorrow (May 5), BAJAJ-AUTO board May 6, GESHIP Q4 May 8. All three have tightened/breakeven SLs. SUNPHARMA Q4 May 19 farther out. Day P&L +1.20%. Strategy: protect winners with disciplined SL placement, single small new entry in Realty (uncorrelated to existing holdings — book has no realty/data-center exposure), avoid adding to crowded auto/pharma clusters."
